title: One-shotted a strat with Claude that simply trades for me
author: StevenVinyl
selftext: Check confluences, if unsure -> skip trade. I wasn't even in front of my PC.

comments.author: no-adz
comments.body: Interesting! This dashboard runs in the browser? Or self-coded app? Or inside of VSCode or so? I see the Claud credit usage is included, so you made it as plugin in vscode or so?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: It's a webapp built by a team, runs in browser yeah

comments.author: That-Impression-4776
comments.body: i'm intrigued, but how'd it handle my direct debits?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Platform has a dedicated wallet that handles everything

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body:
There's no true backtesting results with LLM trading since it's not deterministic. 

I hit 9% this month with this strat. 

Backtesting (well, simulation) will be available at the platform (Cod3x) with the next V2 update.
